referenceAdapters.name: shadcn/ui
referenceAdapters.notes: Optional starter vocabulary and block reference. The design contract must work without shadcn/ui installed.

visualReferences.aiPolicy: Inspect applicable approved references before designing or visually modifying a surface; use the smallest relevant set and name the references in the design brief.

skillStack.dispatchPolicy: Select the smallest applicable design-system Skill before UI work. Skills are the executable contract layer; source contracts are compiled context, not pages for agents to browse manually.

defaultSkills.name: design-system
defaultSkills.when: Before UI, component, layout, content-state, motion, or visual-reference work.
defaultSkills.purpose: Apply the selected compiled contract, component source policy, references, and production mappings.

defaultSkills.name: design-review
defaultSkills.when: Before approving or reporting completed UI work.
defaultSkills.purpose: Review rendered states, evidence, accessibility, component mapping, and intentional visual-baseline changes.

saas-workbench.label: SaaS workbench
saas-workbench.notes: Dense repeated work with persistent context, filtering, selection, and object detail.

admin-console.label: Admin console
admin-console.notes: Permission-sensitive management of records, configuration, and bulk actions.

content-studio.label: Content studio
content-studio.notes: Create, review, publish, and recover content while preserving draft context.

marketing-site.label: Marketing site
marketing-site.notes: Explain value, establish trust, and guide one dominant conversion path.
